action.reasoning: Observation: the previous 8-epoch run failed before training due to torchrun rendezvous/TCPStore timeout, while the earlier baseline already achieved 0.1431 Quickdraw accuracy. Analysis: this is an infrastructure issue with elastic launch rather than a modeling problem. To keep progress reliable, switch training to robust single-process DataParallel across all visible GPUs instead of torch.distributed, preserving multi-GPU compute without rendezvous. Also complete the intended augmentation/schedule improvements and train a moderate 8-epoch run, then validate locally. Decision: rewrite train.py to use nn.DataParallel, balanced class-domain sampling, mixup, label smoothing, cosine LR, stronger sketch-oriented augmentation, and save best checkpoint; then run training plus local validation.
action.command: python train.py --epochs 8 --batch_size 192 --num_workers 12 --out_dir checkpoints/baseline_aug && python validate.py --checkpoint checkpoints/baseline_aug/best.pt
